ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Verbal Award for Core services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( OR(RecordType.Name = "Optum Sales Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Consulting Services Sales", RecordType.Name = "Primary Care Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "SNF - Skilled Nursing Facility", RecordType.Name = "AL - Assisted Living Facility", RecordType.Name = "eMAC Sales Opportunity")) && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Verbal Award") && (ISNULL(Verbal_Award_Date__c) || ISNULL(Expected_Sign_Date__c) || ISNULL(Target_Contract_Start_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Verbal Award Date, Expected Sign Date and Target Contract Start Date.
